linkedin.watching: Waiting for your LinkedIn session… Keep this tab open; your account appears here automatically once captured.

camp.heading: Campaigns
camp.sub: Invite + message sequences. New campaigns start in dry-run: nothing is sent until you explicitly turn it off.
camp.name: Name
camp.liveSwitchDesc: While dry-run is on the sequence advances and previews but sends nothing.
camp.stepsHint: Templates support {first_name} {last_name} {company} {title} variables, {{spintax}} spintax and {ai:key} tokens where AI text is inserted. Invite notes over 300 characters are trimmed.
camp.noSteps: No steps yet. A typical sequence: invite → message.
camp.invitePlaceholder: Invite note (optional — noteless invites perform best)
camp.noEnrollments: No enrollments yet — add leads to start.
camp.confirmLiveBody: Real invites and messages will be sent from this campaign’s sender accounts. Daily/weekly caps, warmup and working hours still apply.
camp.addLeadsPlaceholder: One per line: profile URL, public id or URN — optionally add , First, Last, Company, Title
camp.addLeadsHint: Suppressed people and leads already in another active campaign are skipped automatically.
camp.enrollPartial: {{done}}/{{total}} batches enrolled before the request failed. Retry to add the rest.
camp.noValidLeads: No valid leads found — add a profile URL, public id or URN on each line.
camp.savedSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, company or title
camp.csvNeedIdentity: No URL or public id column found. Headers found: {{headers}}
camp.csvNoRows: The CSV has no data rows.
camp.csvAllSkipped: No importable rows: {{invalid}} with an invalid identity, {{empty}} without an identity value.
camp.templateOverwrite: Replace the current content with this template?

offInvite.name: Invite note — simple
offInvite.body: Hello {first_name}, I have been following the work you do at {company}. I believe there may be areas where we can {{add value together|be genuinely useful}} on the export side, and I would be glad to connect.

offMessage.name: First message — introduction
offMessage.body: Hello {first_name}, thank you for connecting. I am curious how you approach exports and new-market development as {title} at {company}. Could you tell me a little about your priorities there?

offFollowup.name: Follow-up — gentle reminder
offFollowup.body: Hello {first_name}, I wanted to add a short note to my previous message. If you are exploring new markets on the {company} side, I would be glad to share a few concrete ideas. Feel free to write whenever it suits you.

sectionsIcebreaker.name: First message — with AI icebreaker
sectionsIcebreaker.body: Hello {first_name}, {ai:icebreaker} I would love to briefly discuss how we could support {company} in your export processes. Would that be alright?
sectionsIcebreaker.icebreaker: Write a single, warm, personalized opening sentence based on the person's company and title. Avoid exaggeration and use a respectful, professional tone.

sectionsFollowup.name: Follow-up — with AI value note
sectionsFollowup.body: Hello {first_name}, just a short reminder. {ai:deger_onerisi} If you are interested, we could arrange a brief call.
sectionsFollowup.degerOnerisi: In one sentence, summarize a concrete value we could offer around exports and new-customer acquisition, tailored to the person's company and sector. Use a respectful, professional tone.

fullInvite.name: Invite note — full AI
fullInvite.prompt: Write a LinkedIn invite note. At most 280 characters, one paragraph, respectful and professional. Personalize to the person's company and title; gently express interest in connecting in the context of exports and new-market development. Do not apply sales pressure.

fullMessage.name: First message — full AI
fullMessage.prompt: Write the first message to send after a connection is accepted. Short (3-4 sentences), warm and respectful. Personalize to the person's company, sector and title; offer a brief conversation about exports and new-customer acquisition. Do not sell directly.

fullFollowup.name: Follow-up — full AI
fullFollowup.prompt: Write a gentle follow-up to send when the previous message went unanswered. At most 3 sentences, no pressure. Recall one concrete value point about exports or new markets tailored to the person's company, and kindly invite them to reply when convenient. Use a respectful, professional tone.

ai.previewMissingHint: Missing fields render empty in the message.
ai.sectionsTemplateHint: You can write a section key in the template as {ai:key} or directly as {key} to mark where each AI section is inserted.
ai.sectionsDataNote: The lead’s fields, including the custom fields from your import, are shared with the AI model when sections are generated.
ai.noSections: No AI sections yet. Add one to generate part of the message, such as an icebreaker.
ai.sectionPromptPlaceholder: Prompt for this section, e.g. a one-line personalized icebreaker.
ai.dupKeys: Two sections share the same key. Give each section a unique key.
ai.saveBlocked: Some steps have errors. Fix the highlighted fields before saving.
ai.previewBlocked: Fix this step’s errors to preview.
ai.errFullPromptLong: The prompt can be at most {{max}} characters.
ai.errNoSection: Add at least one section with a key and a prompt.
ai.errSectionPrompt: Enter a prompt for this section.
ai.errSectionPromptLong: The section prompt can be at most {{max}} characters.
ai.errTemplateMalformed: The template has a malformed {ai:…} token.
ai.errTemplateMissing: The template uses {ai:key} that has no matching section.
ai.fullDesc: The lead’s fields, including the custom fields from your import, are shared with the AI model, which writes the whole message.
ai.fullPlaceholder: Describe the message the AI should write.
ai.sampleData: Using sample data (Ayşe Yılmaz, Acme GmbH).
ai.inviteLimitHint: LinkedIn trims invite notes at 300 characters.

warn.invite_note_over_300: This invite note is over 300 characters and LinkedIn will trim it.
warn.no_ai_token_in_template: The template has no {ai:key} token, so the AI sections will not appear in the message.

inbox.heading: Replies

admin.title: Research — COGS & Margin (internal)
admin.subtitle: Real per-tenant research costs vs billed leads. Customers never see these numbers.
admin.searchHint: Search-engine share of COGS (already inside the total — do not add)
admin.grantHint: Top up a tenant's lead quota. Grants are idempotent (safe to retry).
admin.setupHint: ICP generation (Opus) spend — setup cost, separate from harvest COGS
admin.tierHint: Tier drives the monthly auto-grant and per-run reservation size. The worker applies period grants automatically; the button forces it now (idempotent).
admin.failedCostHint: Failed run attempts' partial spend (not included in the total COGS line)
admin.modelsHint: The provider per role is fixed in code; the model it runs is editable here. Changes apply to new runs within ~30s. Reset reverts to the environment default.
admin.stepCostsHint: Every metered AI step — including the wizard steps (profile crawl, geo, offer, ICP revise) that the per-tenant COGS line does not include.
admin.modelCostsHint: Historical spend attributed per provider/model, recomputed at current rates.

editor.testNote: Spintax and variables are filled with sample data (e.g. Ahmet, Acme).

settings.title: Campaign Settings
settings.savedHint: Live fields are saved; fields marked "Soon" will go live in an upcoming update.
settings.scheduleDesc: Send emails only within the selected days and time range, in this timezone.
settings.limitsDesc: Protect your domain reputation by capping send volume.
settings.dailyLimitNote: Maximum number of emails this campaign sends per day.
settings.perInboxLimitNote: Maximum emails each sending mailbox sends in a day.
settings.jitterNote: Adds a random gap of 0 to this many minutes (down to the second) before each send, breaking up robotic timing.
settings.accountsDesc: Spread the campaign across multiple connected inboxes to protect each one's reputation.
settings.accountsHint: Leave empty to use the default mailbox. With multiple, contacts are spread across them and each contact always gets the same inbox.
settings.senderNamesHint: These names apply across all campaigns.
settings.ccDesc: Carbon-copy (CC) addresses added to the email.
settings.ccHint: A copy of each contact's email is also sent to these addresses.
settings.trackingDesc: Toggle open and click tracking for this campaign.

list.deleteConfirm: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
list.deleteOnlyDraftHint: Only draft campaigns can be deleted.

audience.showingNote: Showing {{shown}} of {{total}}. Use "Enroll all" for the rest.
audience.removeConfirm: {{name}} will be removed from this campaign and will receive no further emails.

activation.title: Ready to activate?
activation.audienceEmpty: No contacts yet (you can add later)

stats.trackingOff: Open and click tracking is not configured, so these counts may stay at zero. Replies are still tracked.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.submitted: Your feedback has been received. Thank you!

placeholders.featureTitle: What feature would you like to see?
placeholders.featureDescription: How do you expect this feature to work?
placeholders.bugDescription: How can we reproduce the bug? What did you expect, what happened?

errors.submitFailed: Could not submit feedback. Please try again.

setup.title: PlusVibe API
setup.configuredViaEnv: PlusVibe API is configured via server environment variables.
setup.notConfigured: PlusVibe API is not configured. Set PLUSVIBE_API_KEY and PLUSVIBE_WORKSPACE_ID env vars.

report.panelDesc: Downloads a summary XLSX report for the selected month.

deliverability.title: Deliverability Health
deliverability.description: See the status of your connected sending mailboxes at a glance. This panel only displays, it makes no changes.

contactIntel.committeeGap: No decision maker identified among active contacts. Map the buying committee to move this deal forward.

opsAnalytics.title: Operations
opsAnalytics.subtitle: How the team is working right now — tasks, ownership and stage velocity.
opsAnalytics.openTasksDesc: Tasks still pending (not yet completed or cancelled). Click to open Tasks.
opsAnalytics.overdueTasksDesc: Pending tasks whose due date has passed. Click to review overdue tasks.
opsAnalytics.completionRateDesc: Of the tasks that fell due in the last {{days}} days, the share now completed.
opsAnalytics.unownedActiveDesc: Active pipeline companies with no owner. Click to open the unassigned queue.
opsAnalytics.staleContactDesc: Active companies with no logged contact in the last {{days}} days.
opsAnalytics.ownerLoadDesc: Open and overdue pending tasks per owner.
opsAnalytics.stageDwellDesc: How long active companies have sat in their current stage. Click a stage to open the pipeline.

deals.sectionSubtitle: Open and closed deals for this company
deals.title: Deal
deals.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this deal? This action cannot be undone.
deals.emptyDescription: Start the sales process by creating the first deal from this company's current stage.
deals.noContacts: No contacts have been added to this deal yet.
deals.noTasks: No tasks linked to this deal.

savedViews.shareHint: Shared views are visible to everyone in your workspace.
savedViews.exportEmpty: Nothing to export with the current filters.
savedViews.exportCapped: Export was limited to the first {{count}} rows.
savedViews.favoritesEmpty: No favorites yet. Star a company to add it here.

archive.archiveConfirmDesc: This company will be archived and hidden from the default list, pipeline and search. You can restore it anytime, nothing is deleted.
archive.archiveContactConfirm: Archive this contact? You can restore it anytime.
archive.archivedBannerDesc: This record is archived and hidden from the default views. Restore it to bring it back.

qualification.objectionNotesPlaceholder: Objections raised and how they were handled
qualification.searchFiltersIgnored: Priority, qualification and tag filters don't apply during a text search.

merge.title: Merge records
merge.loadError: Could not load the records to merge.
merge.directionNotice: The duplicate will be merged into the current record, which is kept.
merge.fieldTableTitle: Choose which value to keep for each field
merge.disableNotice: The duplicate is not deleted; it is disabled and kept for reference.

salesAnalytics.title: Sales
salesAnalytics.subtitle: Win/loss and cycle reflect the selected window; pipeline value and forecast are a live snapshot.
salesAnalytics.wonDesc: Deals closed as won in the last {{days}} days.
salesAnalytics.lostDesc: Deals closed as lost in the last {{days}} days.
salesAnalytics.winRateDesc: Of deals decided in the last {{days}} days, the share won (won ÷ won+lost).
salesAnalytics.avgCycleDesc: Average days from a deal's creation to its win, for deals won in the window.
salesAnalytics.dataQualityDesc: Share of open deals that carry both an amount and an expected close date. The forecast needs this to be reliable.
salesAnalytics.forecastNote: Pipeline value sums open deal amounts. The weighted forecast multiplies each deal by its stage win probability; it appears only when at least {{threshold}}% of open deals have an amount and a close date.
salesAnalytics.noPipeline: No open deals with an amount yet.
salesAnalytics.pipelineValueDesc: Total amount of open deals in this currency ({{count}} deals).
salesAnalytics.forecastDesc: Open deal amounts weighted by each stage's win probability.
salesAnalytics.forecastInsufficient: Insufficient data: only {{quality}}% of open deals have an amount and close date ({{threshold}}% needed).
salesAnalytics.lossReasonsDesc: Why deals were lost in the last {{days}} days.
salesAnalytics.sourceConversionDesc: All-time deal outcomes grouped by lead source.
salesAnalytics.stageFunnelDesc: How currently-open deals are distributed across pipeline stages.
salesAnalytics.closeCalendarDesc: Open deal value by expected close month.
salesAnalytics.noCloseDates: No open deals have an expected close date.
salesAnalytics.empty: No deals yet. Create deals to see sales analytics and a forecast here.

bulkEdit.taskAffected: A task will be created for {{count}} companies
bulkEdit.errForeignTag: Tag does not belong to this workspace
bulkEdit.errSchemaMissing: This feature is not available yet
